race.name: L'Etape Slovakia by Tour de France
race.display_name: L'Étape Slovakia by Tour de France
race.tagline: Official Tour de France amateur cycling event in Slovakia

vitals.entry_fee: Early-bird pricing available; exact cost not specified

terrain.surface: Urban roads through Bratislava center, peripheral historical areas, picturesque villages in Malé Karpaty foothills, Pezinok vineyards, Carpathian Forest Park peaks
features: Urban roads through Bratislava center, peripheral historical areas, picturesque villages in Malé Karpaty foothills, Pezinok vineyards, Carpathian Forest Park peaks

fondo_rating.scoring_notes: Migrated from gravel-race-automation. Original score: 76. adventure dimension dropped, road_surface added. Score recalculated: 74.

course_description.character: Urban start through Bratislava center, historical peripheral areas, Malé Karpaty foothill villages, **Suffering Zone: Pezinok vineyard climbs**, Carpathian Forest Park peaks to iconic Kamzík finish. **Suffering Zones:** Vineyard rollers (technical descents), final Carpathian peak grind to Kamzík.

logistics.transport: Start: Štrkovec Lake. Finish: Kamzík. Professional organization with high-level security, timing systems, expo village. Registration open. Family Day August 22 with kids races and shorter rides.

history.origin_story: 6th edition in 2026 (started ~2021). Part of global L'Etape Series (founded 1993, 21 countries). Slovak ambassadors: Peter Velits (6x Tour de France) and Martin Velits (1x Tour de France).

biased_opinion.summary: L'Etape Slovakia delivers authentic Tour de France atmosphere in stunning Carpathian setting. The 112km/1700m Race route through Bratislava's vineyards and forests offers genuine gran fondo challenge with professional polish. Velits brothers' involvement adds local prestige. Must-do for Central European cyclists seeking L'Etape Series qualifier experience.

youtube_data.search_query: L'Etape Slovakia by Tour de France gran fondo cycling Bratislava

videos.title: Highlights | 🇸🇰 L'Etape Slovakia by Tour de France | 2024 🚲
videos.channel: L'Etape Series by Tour de France
videos.description:
🇸🇰🫶 What a weekend and an incredible winner!
☀️ Perfect weather and temperature.
🚴‍♀️🚴‍♂️ Fantastic people, from participants to volunteers and organizers.

Everything was flawless in Bratislava, Slovakia!

Ďakujem všetkým! 

---------

L'Etape by Tour de France is a series of amateur cycling events designed to experience the Tour de France Legend. It is the only event where you can race and feel like a Tour de France champion, and where you can enjoy the Tour de France unique atmosphere and passion.

“The Tour de France is the world's greatest cycling race. Each year it is passionately followed by fans around the world so it has naturally given rise to L'Etape by Tour de France series”, says Christian Prudhomme, Tour de France director. 

The series has now expanded to more than 22 international locations including:
🇫🇷 France
🇧🇷 Brasil
🇲🇽 México
🇨🇴 Colombia
🇨🇳 China
🇦🇺 Australia
🇹🇭 Thailand
🇨🇭 Switzerland
🇮🇩 Indonesia
🇪🇸 Spain
🇲🇾 Malaysia
🇸🇰 Slovakia
🇨🇿 Czech Republic
🇬🇧 UK
🇨🇦 Canada
🇺🇸 USA
🇳🇱 Netherlands
🇨🇾 Cyprus
🇸🇮 Slovenia
🇪🇨 Ecuador
🇪🇬 Egypt
🇹🇷 Türkiye
🇨🇷 Costa Rica
🇵🇹 Portugal
🇪🇸 Spain 

Among these Tour de France official cycling events is of course L'Étape du Tour. With a peloton of 15 000 riders and 50 nationalities, it is Europe's biggest cycling event. Riding on the same routes and under the same conditions as Tour de France champions: this is the promise that L'Étape du Tour has kept since 1993.

Check out https://www.letapebytourdefrance.com/ for more information.

Join us on:
-Facebook 👉 https://www.facebook.com/letapebytourdefrance
-Instagram 👉 https://www.instagram.com/letapebytourdefrance/
-Strava 👉 https://www.strava.com/clubs/letapebyletourdefrance

videos.title: L'Etape Slovakia 2021 - HIGHLIGHTS | L'Etape by Tour de France
videos.channel: L'Etape Series by Tour de France
videos.description:
"In Slovakia, L'Etape set up a new level of how a road cycling race should look like. The organization was fantastic the whole team of L'Etape did a huge job and excellence.
The emotion before, during, and after the race was brilliant. Lots of great people who share the same hobby supported each other and create a feeling of a big cycling family.
For myself, I can say this was the best road cycling race that I attended. I'm looking forward to the next year, and definitely, I will visit this race series in other countries also!"
- Marek Korstna, L'Etape Social Rider

---------

videos.title: Highlights | L'Etape Slovakia by Tour de France 2023 🤩
videos.channel: L'Etape Series by Tour de France
videos.description:
L’Etape Slovakia is run under full Tour de France professional conditions and with world-class mechanical support. L’Etape Slovakia is a competitive event for amateur riders, while also providing a safe and enjoyable traffic-free riding environment for others who would like to discover Slovakian routes and complete the magical course.

The Municipality of Brastislava is the host city with Village and start near Štrkovec lake and finish in Kamzik.

👉https://https://slovakia.letapebytourdefrance.com/
__________
